input_text: Mamak dekat rumah aku ni memang terbaik. Roti canai dia crispy luar, lembut dalam. Dah 20 tahun makan situ, uncle tu dah kenal muka aku.
reason: Warm personal story about a favorite mamak restaurant. Everyday Malaysian dining experience.

input_text: Pasar malam Taman Connaught memang panjang gila. Jalan dari hujung ke hujung pun dah sejam. Tapi berbaloi sebab makanan dia murah dan sedap.
reason: Positive description of a popular night market experience. Casual community commentary.

input_text: SPM result keluar esok. Malam ni mesti ramai budak tak boleh tidur. Aku pun dulu macam tu, nervous sampai sakit perut. Good luck semua!
reason: Empathetic post about SPM exam stress with encouragement. Relatable student experience.

input_text: Tahun ni balik kampung raya memang meriah. Nenek masak rendang, makcik buat kuih lapis, sepupu semua berkumpul. Rindu moment macam ni.
reason: Nostalgic story about Hari Raya family gathering in kampung. Warm cultural content.

input_text: Char kuey teow Penang dengan KL memang lain. Penang guna arang, rasa smoky dia memang tak boleh lawan. KL punya pun sedap tapi different style la.
reason: Lighthearted food comparison between Penang and KL char kuey teow. Classic Malaysian food debate.

input_text: Hidup kampung memang best. Pagi-pagi dengar ayam berkokok, petang mandi sungai. Sekarang dah duduk KL, rindu sangat kehidupan tenang macam tu.
reason: Nostalgic reflection on kampung life versus city living. Everyday Malaysian sentiment.

input_text: Setiap kali family gathering mesti ada soalan 'bila nak kahwin?' Aku baru 25 la makcik, relax sikit boleh tak 😂
reason: Humorous complaint about common family gathering questions. Relatable Malaysian humor.

input_text: Jam kat LDP pagi tadi memang teruk. 2 jam dari Puchong ke Damansara. Baik aku naik basikal je, lagi cepat sampai rasanya.
reason: Everyday traffic complaint about a well-known Malaysian highway. Common commuter frustration.

input_text: Panas gila hari ni, rasa macam nak cair. AC pun macam tak cukup. Nasib baik ada cendol kat tepi jalan, terus singgah beli.
reason: Weather complaint about Malaysian heat with a humorous coping solution. Casual daily life post.

input_text: Teh tarik mamak pukul 2 pagi memang lain macam. Entah apa rahsia dia, tapi rasa dia lebih sedap dari buat sendiri kat rumah.
reason: Appreciation of late-night mamak culture, a quintessential Malaysian experience.

input_text: Aku masih ingat zaman sekolah rendah, setiap rehat mesti berebut beli nasi lemak makcik kantin. 50 sen je dulu. Sekarang dah RM3.
reason: Nostalgic post about growing up in Malaysia with price comparison humor. Everyday reminiscence.

input_text: Hujan lebat petang tadi, terus banjir kilat depan rumah. Nasib baik tak parking kereta kat bawah. Setiap kali hujan memang kena berhati-hati.
reason: Common weather experience about flash floods in Malaysia. Personal safety awareness post.

input_text: Mak aku masak laksa Kedah hari ni. Bau dia sampai jiran sebelah pun datang tanya resepi. Tu la magic masakan kampung, semua orang tertarik.
reason: Heartwarming story about home cooking and neighborly community spirit.

input_text: STPM memang level lain punya susah. Aku ambil 3 subjek je pun rasa macam nak pengsan. Respect semua budak STPM yang survive tu.
reason: Relatable student experience about STPM exam difficulty with peer encouragement.

input_text: Hari ni masak nasi goreng kampung untuk lunch. Simple je tapi sedap. Tambah telur mata kerbau dan kicap manis, dah cukup perfect.
reason: Simple home cooking post about a beloved Malaysian dish. Everyday content.

input_text: Kerja dari rumah memang best sebab boleh pakai baju tidur. Tapi kadang-kadang rindu jugak lepak kat pantry office, gossip dengan colleague.
reason: Lighthearted work-from-home anecdote about missing office social life.

input_text: Weekend ni nak bawa family pergi Cameron Highlands. Dah lama tak makan jagung bakar dan strawberry fresh. Budak-budak pun excited gila.
reason: Family outing plans to a popular Malaysian tourist destination. Positive daily life content.

input_text: Roti tissue kat mamak Sri Melur memang paling tinggi sekampung. Sampai kena angkat kepala nak tengok top dia. Budak-budak memang suka.
reason: Fun description of an iconic mamak dish. Lighthearted community dining experience.

input_text: Makcik jual kuih kat pasar pagi dah kenal aku. Setiap kali aku datang, dia terus simpan onde-onde 5 biji. Itulah servis personal terbaik.
reason: Sweet community interaction at a morning market. Everyday Malaysian warmth.

input_text: Nak pergi kerja pukul 7 pun dah jam. KL memang macam ni la, bangun pukul 5 baru ada harapan sampai on time. Penat betul.
reason: Relatable KL traffic and commute frustration. Common daily life complaint.

input_text: Baru lepas siapkan rumah untuk Raya. Cat baru, langsir baru, carpet baru. Poket menangis tapi rumah nampak cantik. Worth it la kan.
reason: Hari Raya home preparation story with humorous take on spending. Cultural content.

input_text: Nasi lemak tepi jalan RM2.50 lagi sedap dari nasi lemak hotel RM25. Fight me on this. Sambal kena betul, ikan bilis rangup, dah cukup.
reason: Classic Malaysian food opinion defending roadside nasi lemak. Playful everyday debate.

input_text: Anak aku baru masuk darjah satu. Beg sekolah dia lagi besar dari dia. Comel sangat tengok dia bersemangat pergi sekolah hari pertama.
reason: Sweet parenting moment about a child's first day of school. Wholesome family content.

input_text: Dulu kat kampung, waktu petang semua budak main galah panjang dan batu seremban. Sekarang budak-budak main phone je. Zaman memang dah berubah.
reason: Nostalgic reflection comparing traditional Malaysian games with modern times. Harmless generational observation.

input_text: Paling best pasal Malaysia ni, nak makan pukul 3 pagi pun senang. Mamak buka 24 jam. Negara lain mana ada macam ni.
reason: Patriotic appreciation of Malaysia's 24-hour food culture. Positive national pride.

input_text: Setiap kali tukar musim durian, office aku mesti ada drama. Satu group suka, satu group tak tahan bau. Tahun-tahun macam ni la.
reason: Humorous workplace anecdote about the durian season divide. Classic Malaysian humor.

input_text: Boss aku suruh submit report pukul 5, tapi pukul 4.55 baru dia bagi data. Malaysian workplace classic move ni. Sabar je la.
reason: Relatable workplace humor about last-minute deadlines. Non-discriminatory office anecdote.

input_text: Lama tak balik Melaka. Rindu makan cendol Jonker Street, chicken rice ball, dan jalan-jalan kat A Famosa. Kena plan balik cepat ni.
reason: Nostalgic post about missing Melaka's famous food and attractions. Positive travel sentiment.

input_text: Baru try buat roti jala sendiri kat rumah. First attempt memang hancur, tapi third attempt dah nampak cantik. Mak mesti bangga kalau tengok.
reason: Home cooking attempt story with self-deprecating humor. Warm family-oriented content.

input_text: Sekolah anak aku ada Sports Day esok. Kena bangun awal set up khemah, buat sandwich. Penat tapi happy tengok budak-budak excited.
reason: Parenting experience about school Sports Day preparations. Wholesome community content.

input_text: Motor aku rosak tengah-tengah highway tadi. Nasib baik PLUS highway patrol datang cepat tolong. Salute la diorang, servis tiptop.
reason: Personal roadside assistance story with praise for highway patrol service. Positive community experience.

input_text: Mee goreng mamak kat KL memang lain. Pedas dia bukan main, tapi lepas satu sudu mesti nak lagi. Addictive gila.
reason: Enthusiastic review of mamak mee goreng. Standard food appreciation post.

input_text: Baru pindah rumah baru. Jiran sebelah terus datang bagi kuih dan nasi. Terharu betul, tak sangka orang masih baik macam ni.
reason: Heartwarming neighborly welcome story. Positive Malaysian community spirit.

input_text: Cuaca Malaysia ni memang unpredictable. Pagi panas terik, tengahari hujan lebat, petang panas balik. Nak pakai baju apa pun confuse.
reason: Humorous weather observation about Malaysia's tropical climate. Everyday relatable content.

input_text: Baru habis marathon makan durian dengan kawan-kawan. 10 biji Musang King habis dalam sejam. Esok confirm sakit perut tapi tak kisah la, puas hati.
reason: Fun durian eating experience with friends. Classic Malaysian seasonal activity.

input_text: The best thing about growing up in Malaysia is the food diversity. Monday nasi lemak, Tuesday dim sum, Wednesday banana leaf rice. We're so spoiled honestly.
reason: Appreciation of Malaysian food diversity. Positive multicultural sentiment.

input_text: Just survived the morning rush on the LRT. Got squeezed between two backpacks and someone's umbrella poked me three times. Classic Monday vibes in KL.
reason: Humorous commute story about LRT experience. Relatable urban Malaysian life.

input_text: My mom's CNY reunion dinner is legendary. She starts prepping a week early - the steamed fish, the yee sang, the bak kwa. The whole house smells amazing.
reason: Warm Chinese New Year family tradition story. Cultural celebration content.

input_text: SPM results day was the most stressful day of my life. I remember my hands literally shaking when I opened the envelope. Thankfully it worked out.
reason: Personal SPM results day experience. Relatable student memory.

input_text: Malaysian drivers have this unspoken rule where you flash your hazard lights to say thank you. I love that. It's like a little car hug.
reason: Charming observation about Malaysian driving culture. Positive community behavior.

input_text: There's nothing quite like sitting at a mamak at midnight watching a football match with complete strangers who become your best friends for 90 minutes.
reason: Warm description of mamak football culture bringing people together. Positive social bonding.

input_text: I miss the days when pasar malam was the highlight of the week. Getting RM5 from dad and feeling like a millionaire choosing between ramly burger and apam balik.
reason: Nostalgic childhood pasar malam memory. Wholesome growing-up-in-Malaysia content.

input_text: My office pantry debate this week: which state has the best laksa? Sarawak laksa fans vs Penang assam laksa gang. No conclusion reached, as always.
reason: Fun workplace food debate about regional laksa varieties. Harmless Malaysian food rivalry.

input_text: Every Malaysian kid has that one auntie who pinches your cheeks and says 'wah so chubby already!' at every family gathering. It's a rite of passage.
reason: Humorous universal Malaysian family gathering experience. Self-deprecating cultural humor.

input_text: Took my kids to the paddy fields in Kedah last weekend. They'd never seen rice growing before. City kids really need to experience kampung life at least once.
reason: Wholesome parenting story about connecting children with rural Malaysian life.

input_text: The Deepavali open house tradition is something I genuinely love about Malaysia. My Indian colleagues always invite everyone, and the murukku is always top-tier.
reason: Positive appreciation of Deepavali celebrations and multicultural workplace spirit.

input_text: KL traffic at 5pm is basically a parking lot. I've started listening to podcasts during my commute and honestly I've learned more there than in university.
reason: Humorous take on KL traffic with a silver lining. Everyday commuter content.

input_text: My grandma still makes kuih kapit every Chinese New Year using the old charcoal iron mold. The ones from the shop don't even come close. It's an art form.
reason: Nostalgic appreciation of traditional Chinese New Year baking. Cultural heritage content.

input_text: Honestly, Malaysian humor is just complaining about the weather, traffic, and food prices but in the funniest way possible. We're all professional comedians at heart.
reason: Self-deprecating observation about Malaysian humor culture. Lighthearted meta-commentary.

input_text: Went back to my old primary school yesterday. Everything looks so much smaller now. The canteen where I used to buy ice cream for 20 sen is still there though.
reason: Nostalgic visit to childhood school. Heartwarming growing-up-in-Malaysia memory.

input_text: The Malaysian Uncle who gives unsolicited life advice at the kopitiam is a national treasure. Yesterday one told me to invest in gold. Thanks Uncle, noted.
reason: Affectionate humor about kopitiam culture and chatty uncles. Warm community observation.

input_text: Rain in Malaysia doesn't just rain, it performs. Thunder, lightning, wind - the whole production. And then 30 minutes later, sunshine like nothing happened.
reason: Vivid humorous description of Malaysian tropical rain. Everyday weather commentary.

input_text: I don't care what anyone says, the best nasi lemak is always the one wrapped in banana leaf from some random roadside stall. That's just facts.
reason: Playful food opinion about nasi lemak served in banana leaf. Classic Malaysian food take.

input_text: My colleague brought homemade pineapple tarts to the office today and now I understand why people fight over these during CNY. They're absolutely incredible.
reason: Workplace snack appreciation during festive season. Positive multicultural interaction.

input_text: Had a 3-hour study session at the mamak yesterday. Ordered one teh tarik and somehow it lasted the entire time. Mamak is the real coworking space.
reason: Humorous take on using mamak as a study or work space. Relatable student and young professional behavior.

input_text: Every time it rains heavily in KL I check Twitter to see which roads are flooded. It's become a survival strategy at this point.
reason: Practical and humorous observation about navigating flash floods in KL. Everyday coping strategy.

input_text: UEC考试压力真的很大，每天温习到半夜。不过想到以后可以拿好成绩进大学，就咬牙撑过去吧。加油同学们！
reason: Relatable UEC exam stress with peer encouragement. Standard student experience.

input_text: 妈妈今天做了她拿手的客家酿豆腐，那个味道真的太怀念了。在外面工作这么久，最想念的就是妈妈的菜。
reason: Nostalgic appreciation of mother's Hakka yong tau foo cooking. Warm family content.

input_text: 新年快到了，开始准备年饼了。花生饼、黄梨饼、鸡蛋糕，每年都是这几样，但少了哪个都不行。这就是传统的力量。
reason: Chinese New Year baking preparations. Positive cultural tradition content.

input_text: 今天去茨厂街吃了碗云吞面，师傅手工揉的面条，口感真的不一样。这种老店越来越少了，要珍惜啊。
reason: Appreciation of traditional wonton noodles at Petaling Street. Heritage food culture content.

input_text: 吉隆坡的交通真的让人崩溃，每天上班堵一两个小时。不过想想至少有车听歌，就当是移动KTV吧。
reason: Humorous take on KL traffic jams with a positive coping mechanism. Everyday commuter content.

input_text: 大马的天气就是一个字：热！不过热归热，冰kacang和ABC冰一吃，什么烦恼都没了。这就是热带生活的好处。
reason: Weather complaint about Malaysian heat with dessert solution. Casual daily life post.

input_text: 过年回外婆家最开心了。表兄弟姐妹们一起打牌、放烟花、吃团圆饭。小时候觉得平常，现在才知道多珍贵。
reason: Nostalgic Chinese New Year family reunion story. Wholesome festive memory.

input_text: 在大马长大真的很幸福，早餐吃椰浆饭，午餐吃扁担饭，晚餐去mamak。每一餐都是不同的文化体验。
reason: Appreciation of Malaysian food diversity across cultures. Positive multicultural sentiment.

input_text: 今天公司团建去了金马伦高原，摘草莓、喝菊花茶、吃玉米。难得离开城市，感觉整个人都放松了。
reason: Pleasant workplace outing to Cameron Highlands. Positive leisure activity content.

input_text: 怡保的白咖啡真的名不虚传，喝了一杯还想再来一杯。老街上的咖啡店坐满了人，大家都是冲着这个味道来的。
reason: Appreciation of Ipoh white coffee culture. Positive food tourism content.

input_text: 小学时候最开心的就是课间去食堂买五毛钱的冰条。那种简单的快乐，现在想起来还是会笑。
reason: Nostalgic childhood school canteen memory. Wholesome growing-up content.

input_text: 下雨天最适合在家煮泡面加蛋了。窗外雨声淅沥，手里一碗热腾腾的面，这就是大马人的小确幸。
reason: Cozy rainy day comfort food moment. Simple daily life pleasure.

input_text: 中秋节提灯笼的日子还记得吗？一排小朋友提着灯笼在花园走，那画面真的很美。现在的小孩都用电子灯笼了。
reason: Nostalgic Mid-Autumn Festival childhood memory. Cultural tradition content.

input_text: 周末去了巴生吃肉骨茶，那个胡椒汤底真的一绝。配上油条和白饭，吃到肚子快爆了才肯走。
reason: Klang bak kut teh food trip experience. Classic Malaysian food content.

input_text: எங்க அம்மா தீபாவளிக்கு செய்ற முறுக்கு யாரும் அடிக்க முடியாது. ஒரு மாசத்துக்கு முன்னாடியே தயாரிப்பு ஆரம்பிச்சிடுவாங்க. அந்த மணம் வீடு முழுக்க பரவும்.
reason: Deepavali murukku preparation story about mother's cooking. Warm cultural family content.

input_text: SPM முடிவு வந்தப்போ என் கைகள் நடுங்கின. ஆனா நல்ல marks வாங்கினேன். அம்மா அப்பா முகத்துல இருந்த சந்தோஷம் மறக்க முடியாது.
reason: SPM results day emotional memory. Wholesome student and family experience.

input_text: மலேசியாவில் வளர்ந்ததில் எனக்கு மிகவும் பிடித்தது உணவு. காலையில் தோசை, மதியம் நாசி லெமாக், இரவு மீ கோரெங். சொர்க்கம் தான்.
reason: Appreciation of Malaysian food diversity. Positive multicultural daily life content.

input_text: பள்ளி நாட்களில் கேன்டீனில் ice cream potong வாங்குவது தான் ஒரே சந்தோஷம். அந்த red bean flavour இன்னும் மனசுல இருக்கு.
reason: Nostalgic school canteen memory about ice cream potong. Wholesome childhood content.

input_text: தீபாவளி அன்று காலையில எண்ணெய் தேச்சு குளிச்சு, புது dress போட்டு, கோவிலுக்கு போவது. அந்த feeling-ஐ வேற எதுவும் replace பண்ண முடியாது.
reason: Traditional Deepavali morning routine description. Positive cultural celebration content.

input_text: KL-ல traffic ஒரு மாதிரி தான். காலையில 7 மணிக்கே கிளம்பினாலும் office-க்கு 9 மணிக்கு தான் போய் சேருவோம். பொறுமை வேணும் சாமி.
reason: Relatable KL traffic complaint. Everyday commuter frustration expressed humorously.

input_text: பொங்கல் பண்டிகையன்று வீட்டுல பொங்கல் வச்சோம். பால் பொங்கி வரும்போது 'பொங்கலோ பொங்கல்' சொல்ற அந்த moment-ஐ நினைச்சாலே சந்தோஷமா இருக்கு.
reason: Pongal celebration at home with traditional rituals. Warm cultural festive content.

input_text: என் பாட்டி செய்ற பிரியாணி taste-ஐ எந்த restaurant-லும் கிடைக்காது. அவங்க secret masala recipe யாருக்கும் சொல்ல மாட்டாங்க.
reason: Appreciation of grandmother's biryani cooking with family secret recipe humor. Warm family content.

input_text: மழை பெய்யும்போது சூடா ஒரு cup teh tarik குடிக்கணும். அதுக்கு மேல சொர்க்கமே வேணாம்.
reason: Simple pleasure of hot teh tarik on a rainy day. Cozy everyday Malaysian moment.

input_text: வாரயிறுதியில் பசார் மலாம் போவது எங்க family routine. அப்பா ramly burger வாங்குவார், அம்மா kuih வாங்குவாங்க, நான் sugarcane juice குடிப்பேன்.
reason: Family pasar malam routine with each member's favorite food. Wholesome community life.

input_text: Bro semalam pergi mamak, order roti canai telur goyang. Abang mamak tu flip roti macam pro, skills dia memang next level bhai.
reason: Admiration of mamak roti canai skills. Mixed Malay-English casual speech about everyday dining.

input_text: Pasar malam tadi so packed, jalan pun susah. But I managed to grab my favorite apam balik and keropok lekor. Mission accomplished la.
reason: Mixed English-Malay pasar malam experience. Casual Malaysian social media style.

input_text: SPM Add Maths paper tadi memang killer. Soalan last tu siapa yang boleh jawab, genius la tu. I literally stared at it for 20 minutes then gave up.
reason: Relatable SPM exam difficulty experience. Mixed language student frustration.

input_text: CNY tahun ni balik Ipoh celebrate with family. Yee sang session was epic, everyone toss sampai ceiling kena. That's how you know it's a good reunion.
reason: Fun CNY reunion dinner yee sang tossing story. Mixed language festive content.

input_text: Nasi lemak kat office pantry today was so good, I tapau extra satu for dinner. Makcik cleaner yang buat tu memang talented. Kena bukak stall la aunty.
reason: Mixed language praise for office colleague's nasi lemak. Warm workplace interaction.

input_text: Living in kampung dulu was the best la. Pagi-pagi pergi kebun with atuk, petang main guli dengan kawan. Simple life but honestly the happiest times.
reason: Nostalgic kampung childhood memories. Mixed Malay-English heartwarming content.

input_text: Family gathering semalam was so fun tapi of course la ada the classic question - 'Bila nak kahwin?' I'm only 24 la uncle, chill sikit boleh?
reason: Humorous family gathering marriage pressure joke. Universally relatable Malaysian humor in mixed language.

input_text: Colleague aku bawak homemade murukku to office for Deepavali. Satu tin habis dalam 30 minutes. Best gila, siap minta recipe lagi. Truly Malaysian moment la ni.
reason: Multicultural workplace Deepavali sharing. Mixed language positive community interaction.

input_text: Today punya weather memang bipolar. Morning sunny gila, then suddenly hujan like got waterfall from sky. By 4pm sunny again. Malaysia being Malaysia.
reason: Humorous mixed language weather observation. Classic Malaysian tropical climate commentary.

input_text: Traffic kat Federal Highway pagi ni teruk gila bro. I left rumah at 6:30am and still sampai office at 9. Seriously considering work from home full time already.
reason: Mixed language traffic frustration on a well-known highway. Everyday commuter complaint.

input_text: My mak buat rendang for Raya tahun ni memang terbaik. Slow cook for 6 hours, daging lembut gila. Gordon Ramsay pun kalah honestly.
reason: Mixed language praise for mother's Raya rendang with humorous celebrity chef comparison.

input_text: 昨天去pasar malam买了很多东西。Ramly burger一个，satay十支，cendol一碗。花了RM20吃到饱饱的，这就是大马生活的美好。
reason: Mixed Chinese-Malay pasar malam food haul. Positive Malaysian night market experience.

input_text: Office potluck hari ni best sangat. Ada nasi briyani, char siew, vadai, semua ada. This is why Malaysian workplace culture is unmatched la.
reason: Multicultural office potluck appreciation. Mixed language workplace harmony content.

input_text: Baru balik dari Cameron, strawberry dia fresh gila. Kids enjoyed every moment, siap tak nak balik lagi. Family trip macam ni memang priceless la.
reason: Family trip to Cameron Highlands. Mixed language wholesome leisure content.

input_text: Mamak uncle dah kenal my order. Belum duduk pun dia dah jerit 'roti canai satu, teh tarik kurang manis!' That's what I call customer service excellence.
reason: Charming mamak regular customer story. Mixed language community warmth.

input_text: I miss playing batu seremban and congkak during recess in primary school. Everything's digital now but those traditional games really taught us patience and coordination.
reason: Nostalgic childhood traditional game memories. Positive reflection on Malaysian heritage games.

input_text: First Raya away from family was tough. I video-called my mom and we both got emotional. Luckily friends invited me to their open house, so I wasn't alone.
reason: Emotional Hari Raya away from family story with friends stepping in. Touching community support.

input_text: My Grab driver just now was telling me about his kampung in Kelantan. The way he described the budu and nasi kerabu made me want to book a flight immediately.
reason: Charming Grab ride conversation about Kelantanese food. Positive everyday interaction.

input_text: 每次回怡保，一定要去那间老字号吃炸鸡翅粉。从小吃到大，味道一点都没变。这种老味道越来越难找了。
reason: Nostalgic Ipoh traditional food visit. Heritage food appreciation.

input_text: My friend's wedding reception served banana leaf rice for 500 guests and not a single grain of rice was wasted. Now that's what I call proper event planning.
reason: Wedding banana leaf rice service story with appreciation. Positive community event content.
